sc.political_s: FEC records show CREDO Mobile donations overwhelmingly to Democratic candidates and progressive causes; estimated 90%+ Democratic allocation.
sc.dei_s: CREDO publicly commits to DEI initiatives; publishes diversity data and funds progressive advocacy organizations aligned with racial justice.
sc.labor_s: No NLRB findings or OSHA violations found.
sc.charity_s: CREDO donates portion of revenue to progressive nonprofits; 2023 reported $2.5M+ to advocacy groups.
sc.animals_s: Not applicable; mobile virtual network operator with no animal products.
sc.guns_s: Does not manufacture or retail firearms.
sc.privacy_s: No documented breaches or FTC enforcement actions found.
sc.execPay_s: Executive compensation data not publicly disclosed.
